{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603210057502CE49A758D8C4DF8F080"}"},"total":359},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7584481091199746840","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体打发时间还不错，没什么特别不对劲的地方，有点小缺点，主角实力提升的有点慢，从刘备的角度来说，这是一本好书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765903849,"group_id":"7565745560867572760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾不识青天高，黄地厚，唯见月寒日暖，来煎人寿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2dTNjFUKgj4k771gZJqfw4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0d4dd5996f2b4545b3c2ff3e943ab265~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624383&x-signature=5gToaRh4q%2FG6AkJmEp2h6Jb6C%2Bo%3D","user_id":"93114010241","user_name":"神明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93114010241","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774354620,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7565745560867572760","book_info":{"abstract":"[综漫+非正常动漫融合、多女、慢热日常、主角魅魔]

日向源面对出自非正常动漫里的隔壁太太的邀请，脸上装出了难为情的模样说道：
“这不太好吧，我记得没错的话孝幸先生还没出差吧。”
隔壁太太却是丝毫不在意这点。
“那个人怎么样就不要管了，我可以cos源赖光哦。”

主线篇
看着一脸认真的管家，日向源有些惊讶
“管家，你是说我其实是魔界最后一只年轻魅魔？”
“是的，少爷，您要记住多子多福，多女多福啊。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ea003f96451d44df6be1cac6620e4b17","author":"国服墨子","author_id":"","book_id":"7565745560867572760","book_name":"综漫：喜欢我的为什么都是女主？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7565745832255832600","read_count":"58461","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"565449"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"278","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,多女主,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9af0158f85ba915dc44165b8ab2ab8a8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779209870&x-signature=U%2BLQkVQ2%2BxkUbrPPqjoqSRXIr4Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"9216902040587","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603210057502CE49A758D8C4DF8F080"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count"
